head: cfd0982981f52c9858673062de43a93beccc17e5
scoreReconciliation: IR = in-repo engineering only. XC = external/GTM track (separate). See 01-docs/05-audit/SCORING.md v2. certifiedReadiness/composite as IR−gap are retired.

scaffolded: S1-09 — ZWCMP owner awaits Q6 leadership decision

remediationProgress: F1 closed: roadmap rename + README; pnpm test green from clean checkout.
F2 closed (a364439, 6f79a83): replay-guard exempt-path traversal — pathForExemption normalizes + rejects %2e%2e and backslash variants; middleware branch coverage 63.46% → 81.25%.
F3 closed (1b940d7): /audit/bundles tenant scope bound to signed DID, not x-gtcx-tenant-id header; spoof regression test at handler.test.mjs:135,267.
F4 closed (efcc01e): auth-failure events now tag tenantId='platform'; visible to platform-scoped principals via /v1/exceptions; tenant isolation regression test added.
F7 closed (7081223): alerts-add-runbook-url --check now asserts anchor existence; 37 dead anchors backfilled as STUB sections in alerts.md.
F10 closed (3729a29): verify-catalog pinned trust anchor PINNED_PUBLIC_KEY; 8 test cases for every rejection code.
F11-F14 closed (66e9eb0, d8262f0, 22b7f2e, 152d079): regex bypasses in pin-actions-sha, empty-catch-check, runbook-commands-check; missing-label fix in dependabot-triage workflow.
Meta-finding closed (fb26c9f): 5 previously-unwired gates now invoked from validate-all.mjs Static Validators section.

S2-14 closed (570ad49, 2026-05-31): replay-protection package branch coverage now passes at 90.45%; stale empty-catch allowlist entry removed; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-01 closed (570ad49, 2026-05-31): failClosed wired into audit-flush S3 SDK loading and compliance-gateway soft-import/NDJSON parse sites; stale empty-catch allowlist entries removed; audit-flush and compliance-gateway targeted coverage gates pass; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-02 closed (6bfa2ad, 2026-05-31): checkBudget, recordSpend, and getSpend are async and delegate to budget-store.mjs; /v1/query, /v1/budget, /v1/brief, /audit/bundles, and /audit/query await the store-backed budget gates; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-03 closed (694c458, 2026-05-31): auth-failure-throttle now bounds tracked source IPs with maxIps/LRU eviction and exposes recordAndCheckAuthFailure so the auth-failure path atomically decides whether to sign or suppress audit events; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-04 closed (c1dfadd, 2026-05-31): sourceIpFromRequest now trusts X-Forwarded-For only when the socket peer is inside GTCX_TRUSTED_PROXY_CIDRS; spoofed or malformed XFF falls back to the socket IP; IPv4, IPv6, and IPv4-mapped socket addresses have regression coverage; compliance-gateway coverage gate passes; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-05 closed (2e2a80a, 2026-05-31): /v1/exceptions and /v1/audit/evidence-bundle now emit compliance_gateway_requests_total route/status/tenant series plus endpoint-specific exception-count and evidence-record metrics; route integration tests and compliance-gateway coverage gate pass; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 23 of 23 gates.

S2-08 closed (9829b8f, 2026-05-31): every workspace package manifest now requires node >=20.18.0; GitHub setup-node calls and shared action defaults pin exact 20.18.0; node-version-floor-check.mjs is wired into validate-all to prevent drift; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 24 of 24 gates.

S2-06 closed (a9eaa4c, 2026-05-31): HTML evidence responses now set a restrictive Content-Security-Policy header and archived HTML embeds matching CSP metadata; visible table/meta fields strip Unicode bidi control characters while raw NDJSON remains exact for offline signature verification; renderer and route integration tests pass; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 24 of 24 gates.

S2-07 closed (afce75a, 2026-05-31): KYC local screening now fails closed without an explicit SCREENING_LOCAL_SALT outside tests; handler checks for an existing screening result object before re-screening; decoded S3 keys with control characters are rejected before screening or writing results; node 03-platform/tools/scripts/validate-all.mjs passes 24 of 24 gates.
Full-audit 2026-05-31 (afce75a): six-phase fresh audit; internal 7.3 / certified 6.6; S2-09 and S2-10 remain top code gaps; EXT-INF-013 and S2-13 remain top external gaps.
S2-11 closed (2026-05-31): dependabot-policy-check gate validates Q7 pin and tier grouping in validate-all.
S2-12 closed (2026-05-31): SOC 2 checklist agent ownership model + soc2-agent-owners-check; IRP v1 agent-prep section added.
S3-02 structural (2026-05-31): dr-fire-drill-evidence gate validates dr-test.sh contract and writes dated artifact.
S3-03 closed (2026-05-31): soak-baseline.json committed; soak-baseline-check wired in validate-all.
S3-04 structural (2026-05-31): runtime-evidence-check dry-run gate generates and verifies signed release bundle.
S3-05 closed (2026-05-31): canonicalizeValue exported from @gtcx/audit-signer; compliance-data uses shared helper.
S3-06 closed (2026-05-31): S3 stub send no longer advances lastSuccessMs.
S3-09 closed (2026-05-31): contract tests for gateway-tenancy, audit-signer-catalog, replay-protection in validate-all.
Fresh master-audit 2026-06-02 (5b1cc78): prior session remediation committed; docs-standard frontmatter restored; validate-all 38/38 pass; pnpm test pass; working tree clean.
S4-01 closed (2026-06-02): audit-session remediation committed; main baseline is reproducible.

Canonical master-audit 2026-06-02 (4189077): 6-phase formal protocol per gtcx-docs/03-platform/tools/audit/audit-framework; honest scores applied after forensic verification; IR 7.1 / Investor 7.0 / Enterprise 7.0 / Sovereign 6.9; docs-standard 8.5/10; repo hygiene 8.75/10; 38/38 gates green.

10-10-roadmap 2026-06-02 (1dec78f): honest baseline 7.1 → 10.0; M1 Foundation target 8.0 (2-3w); M2 Hardening target 9.0 (4-6w); M3 Certification target 9.5 (2-3mo); M4 Reference target 10.0 (1-2mo); critical path dominated by external dependencies (SOC 2 + pen-test).

M1 Foundation complete (801c2e0): compliance-gateway lint debt resolved (1 error fixed); 6 missing READMEs added; dead cross-repo links fixed (1198/1198); mutable audit default sink durable (NATS in prod/staging, stdout only in dev/test); typecheck/build wired for all 15 packages (18/18 tasks pass); 39/39 gates green.

Bank-grade audit 2026-06-07 (9d7d763): lane-4 certified composite 8.3 (+1.2 vs master-audit 2026-06-02); validate-all 50/50; IR-3.4 gtcx-ctl validate --ci + IR-4.1 USSD soak; external assurance unchanged (pen-test, SOC2, FSCA).
Engineering audit 2026-06-07 (c181138): lane-1 headline 7.9 (signoff 7.5 / completion 8.3); validate-all 50/50; lint/typecheck/test fail on audit-signer + deployment-guard regressions.
Engineering audit 2026-06-06 (6a70f4c): lane-1 headline 7.1 (signoff 5.0 / completion 7.8); validate-all 33/55 post-v3 path drift; lint/typecheck fixed; format + test + P22 check fail.
Execute-roadmap reconcile 2026-06-07: S4-04/05 closed — lint + typecheck green; validate-all 50/50; S4-07 tracks pnpm test quick 1/359 flake.
Execute-roadmap 2026-06-08: S4-06 done — 12 READMEs (dotdirs, scripts, workspace packages, templates, chaos-tests); backlogClear true; S4-07 deferred.
Master audit 2026-06-10: DAAS-S1 complete; validate-all 55/55; composite 8.4 (+0.1); AGX + intelligence staging 200; S39-01 7/7; sovereign fleet gap remains.
Execute-roadmap 2026-06-10: DAAS complete; SECAS-S3 sealed; docs-site lint/tc green; fleet health PASS (curl fallback).
EXT-INF-002 approved 2026-06-10: sovereign pen-test SOW path authorized; evidence audit/evidence/ext-inf-002-sow-approval-2026-06-10.json.
remainingGaps: Operator — npm publish, registry tag, live DR/WORM, dependabot PR merges on main.
IR-1: main CI format + honest README (see ir-10-10-roadmap.md).
IR-2–IR-6: dimension lifts per ir-10-10-roadmap.md (XC track separate).

answered.question: failClosed/budget-store: wire or delete?
answered.rationale: failClosed has 4 documented soft-import sites to wire (~1d); budget-store reuses existing K8s Redis (no net-new infra) and fixes a real HPA-scaled QPS multiplication bug (~2d).

answered.question: Pen-test before or after Sprint 1 fixes?
answered.rationale: Sprint 1 already closed; SOW (S2-13) signed in Sprint 2 targets the post-Sprint-1 state. External review against a stationary post-remediation target is more useful than review against a moving design. No +4w delay.

answered.question: Product motion: product-led vs sales-led?
answered.answer: SALES-LED with primitives as parallel tail
answered.rationale: GTM docs are regulator-led, not developer-led. Sprint 3 headline = S3-11 (ZWCMP signature); S1-09 owner profile = senior pilot-facing operator with prior African-central-bank pilot experience; S3-07 publish-primitives continues in parallel without gating Sprint 3.

answered.question: @types/node dependabot pin?
answered.rationale: Implemented same-day in .github/dependabot.yml — ignore rule on @types/node semver-major. Package.json was already ^22.10.0 (tied to Node 20.x runtime). Open PR #62 to close with rationale.

answered.question: Live-stack pen-test vendor SOW (S2-13)?
answered.rationale: Sovereign approval after DAAS-S1 seal and master audit 8.4; intake pack + vendor artifacts acked; procurement countersign and kickoff authorized.

answered.question: SOC 2 Type I auditor engagement (INT-S12-03)?
answered.rationale: Sovereign approval for auditor selection and engagement; readiness checklist in-repo; CISO/Finance execute MSA.

answered.question: Vendor pen-test SOW countersign (procurement)?
answered.rationale: Sovereign procurement countersign; pen-test window scheduling authorized for gtcx-infrastructure.

answered.question: SOC 2 Type I auditor MSA execution?
answered.rationale: Sovereign approval for auditor MSA execution; Type I fieldwork may proceed after MSA signing.
